goal_results.evidence: llama.py:390-397 — agent replaced logging.warning with torch.triu-based sliding window mask computation (torch.ones bool mask, triu with diagonal=-self.sliding_attention, zeros filled with -inf via masked_fill_). F2P4 PASS confirms behavioral correctness.
llama.py:189 — sliding_attention = [False, False, False, False, False, 1024] contains 1024 as window size. F2P2 PASS confirms config pattern is valid.

llama.py:394-397 — 'if attention_mask is not None: attention_mask = attention_mask + window_mask' (additive) 'else: attention_mask = window_mask' (standalone). F2P5 PASS confirms marker values from original mask are preserved after combination.
llama.py:180 — rope_theta changed from [10000.0, 1000000.0] to [1000000.0, 10000.0], matching the oracle fix exactly.

llama.py:373 still contains '# TODO: implement. (Not that necessary since models are trained on less than 1024 tokens)'. While the logging.warning was removed (line 390 replaced), the TODO comment remains. F2P1 FAIL confirms 'TODO: implement' string is still present.

judge_notes: Agent made exactly the same two structural changes as the oracle: (1) swapped rope_theta order at line 180, (2) replaced sliding attention warning with mask computation at lines 390-397. Both core goals and both secondary goals are met. The only miss is the polish goal (weight 0.02): the agent removed the logging.warning but left the stale '# TODO: implement' comment at line 373. Score = 0.39+0.39+0.10+0.10+0.00 = 0.98. F2P3 and F2P6 failures are not tied to rubric goals (the decomposition_notes confirm oracle also doesn't pass F2P6).
